overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, highway overpasses, and futuristic architecture. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, with heavy rain, reflective wet surfaces, and colorful illuminated advertisements along the sidewalk beneath an elevated highway.

events.description: walks from open intersection into covered area beneath highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along wet sidewalk toward and entering the covered walkway beneath the highway overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking along the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass with orange illuminated edges spanning across the scene
tall street lamp with bright white light and green painted pole
rain-soaked asphalt and concrete reflecting neon lights
distant building facades with pink and blue neon illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a cyberpunk city, with the camera walking toward a highway overpass. Heavy rain falls on wet reflective pavement while neon lights glow in the distance. The camera approaches and enters the covered area beneath the overpass around the 5-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath highway with illuminated advertising walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath the highway overpass, passing under the concrete structure

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead under the overpass in the distance

entered.detail: underside of the highway overpass forming a concrete ceiling overhead
curved wall with large illuminated panels cycling through pink, blue, green, and yellow colors
curved highway on-ramp with orange lighting and vehicle light trails

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the highway overpass, the scene is sheltered from the rain. A colorful illuminated advertising wall cycles through vibrant colors on the left, while the highway ramp curves in the background. The concrete ceiling of the overpass dominates overhead as the camera follows pedestrians ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza between skyscrapers with neon-lit towers

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with tall skyscrapers visible
camera tilts upward to look at the neon-lit skyscrapers and vertical light strips above

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered area and looking up at the towering neon-lit buildings while continuing to walk through the open plaza

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with vertical yellow neon light strips running up the facade
open paved area between buildings with rain falling freely

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a plaza with heavy rain falling freely. The camera tilts up to reveal towering skyscrapers adorned with vertical neon lights against the dark night sky. The highway overpass recedes to the left as the camera moves through the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with colorful illuminated walls and parked vehicles

events.description: re-enters covered walkway beneath the highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk passing parked cars and approaching other pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: curved wall with large color-cycling illuminated panels showing pink, blue, and green
row of parked cars along the right side of the walkway beneath the overpass
yellow and white striped concrete barriers separating the walkway from the road

segments.scene_description: Re-entering the covered walkway beneath the highway, the colorful illuminated wall returns on the left. Parked vehicles line the right side behind concrete barriers. The camera passes a pedestrian with a red umbrella walking in the opposite direction while continuing toward the destination ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching Kang Tao building entrance under highway overpass

events.description: approaches group of pedestrians near the Kang Tao building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the Kang Tao building entrance while passing multiple pedestrians with umbrellas in the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella walking toward camera near the entrance
pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead under the archway

entered.detail: large building entrance with dark facade and illuminated signage reading 'Kang Tao'
illuminated corporate signage for Kang Tao above the building entrance
large arched entryway with warm interior lighting leading into the building

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the Kang Tao building entrance, marked by a large illuminated archway and corporate signage. Multiple pedestrians with umbrellas walk through the covered plaza area. The colorful illuminated wall remains visible on the left as the camera moves toward the building entrance beneath the highway overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk district, moving from an exposed street into the sheltered corridors of a highway overpass and finally toward a corporate entrance. It begins on wet, reflective pavement under heavy rain, advancing toward the concrete shadow of a highway overpass. As the camera enters the covered area, the rain ceases and the environment shifts to a sheltered walkway featuring a vibrant, color-cycling advertising wall and a curving highway ramp in the background. The scene then opens briefly into a rain-swept plaza, where the camera tilts upward to reveal towering neon skyscrapers before turning back under the overpass to pass parked vehicles and a pedestrian with a red umbrella. Finally, the camera follows the illuminated wall toward the Kang Tao building entrance, moving through a crowd of umbrella-carrying pedestrians beneath a large corporate archway.
